description:
Based on a game I reviewed on GTL (slightly modified). There are many variations and I sure missed some details, feel free to comment.
This time doing one point worse than the supercorrect solution is not the goal - but if you do something too crazy or obviously worse you'll still get wrong. So my advice is still always try to play the best way :)
